title: Add HD realistic image for About page

requirements.summary: Generate a high-definition (1920x1080) realistic image suitable for the About Us page hero section
acceptanceCriteria: Image is generated in HD resolution (1920x1080 pixels)
Image has a realistic photographic quality appropriate for a healthcare technology company's About page
Image is saved in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory

file_operations.description: Generate and save the HD realistic hero image depicting a professional healthcare technology office environment with modern team collaboration, natural lighting, and diverse professionals working with medical technology and data analytics displays. The image will be used in the About Us page hero section.

requirements.summary: Integrate the generated HD image into the About Us page hero section, replacing or enhancing the current visual presentation
acceptanceCriteria: The generated image is displayed in the About Us page hero section
Image maintains responsive behavior across different screen sizes
Visual presentation is cohesive with the existing Royal Teal theme and company branding

file_operations.description: Update the hero section to display the generated HD image frontend/public/assets/generated/about-hero.dim_1920x1080.png as a background or foreground element. Ensure the image is properly integrated with responsive design using Tailwind CSS utilities (object-cover, w-full, h-auto) and maintains visual cohesion with the existing Royal Teal theme. The hero section should display the image while preserving existing content such as the page title, mission statement, and CTA buttons.
